title: Obtaining Handles
text: Obtaining Handles To obtain a handle, use the ProcScript function that is appropriate to the object. You can then activate exposed operations on the referenced object. Table 1. ProcScript for Obtaining Handles Object ProcScript for Obtaining a Handle Remarks Component instance newinstance $instancehandle Entity $collhandle Occurrence $occhandle Field $fieldhandle Widget operations are activated using $widgetoperation . OCX control $ocxhandle The operations available depend on the OCX, and are defined in the Script container of the field. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
